MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-27-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT BENJAMIN ROSENFELD'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE GENERAL DAMAGES, PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY'S FEES ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOSENIO LEWIS IS: 1) DENIED AS TO THE GENERAL DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS; 2) GRANTED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS; AND 3) GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE ATTORNEY'S FEES ALLEGATIONS. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER REFLECTING THE COURT'S RULING AND SEND IT IN TO THE COURT TODAY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT BENJAMIN ROSENFELD'S DEMURRER TO ALL THREE CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOSENIO LEWIS IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION FOR LEGAL MALPRACTICE AND BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY AND SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD. THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT ALLEGE EITHER ACTUAL OR REASONABLE RELIANCE ON THE ALLEGED FRAUD BY MR. LEWIS. MR. LEWIS IS GRANTED LEAVE TO CORRECT THIS DEFICIENCY IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER REFLECTING THE COURT'S RULING AND SEND IT IN TO THE COURT TODAY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-13-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2016 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Glasner of Gwire Law Offices telephone number 415-296-8880 for Plaintiff Yosenio Lewis.
Gerald Singleton of Singleton Law Firm, A.P.C. telephone number 760-697-1330 appeared for Defendant Benjamin Rosenfeld.

The Court explained its reasoning and confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Benjamin Rosenfeld's demurrer to all three causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Yosenio Lewis is overruled as to the first and second causes of action for legal malpractice and breach of fiduciary duty and sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to the third cause of action for fraud. The first and second causes of action are adequately pled. The third cause of action does not allege either actual or reasonable reliance on the alleged fraud by Mr. Lewis. Mr. Lewis is granted leave to correct this deficiency if he can do so in good faith. Counsel for the Plaintiff is to prepare a form of order reflecting the Court's ruling and send it in to the Court today.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Yosenio Lewis Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Glasner of Gwire Law Offices telephone number 415-296-8880 for Plaintiff Yosenio Lewis.
Gerald Singleton of Singleton Law Firm, A.P.C. telephone number 760-697-1330 appeared for Defendant Benjamin Rosenfeld.

The Court explained its reasoning and confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Benjamin Rosenfeld's motion to strike the general damages, punitive damages and attorney's fees allegations in the complaint filed by plaintiff Yosenio Lewis is: 1) denied as to the general damages allegations; 2) granted with twenty days leave to amend as to the punitive damages allegations; and 3) granted without leave to amend as to the attorney's fees allegations. The general damages allegations are adequately pled. The punitive damages allegations do not state sufficient facts to show either malice or oppression and do not state sufficient facts of reliance to show fraud. Mr. Lewis is granted leave to correct this deficiency if he can do so in good faith. Mr. Lewis has not alleged any basis for recovery of attorney's fees and it does not appear that he can do so even if granted leave. Counsel for the Plaintiff is to prepare a form of order reflecting the Court's ruling and send it in to the Court today.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
